type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
We updated our reporting calculator that we use to report Keele Valley's emissions.  In prior years, total VOCs were not assessed from fugitive landfill gas for comparison to the NPRI threshold of 10 tonnes released to air at Keele Valley. Only speciated VOCs that were measured were assessed and when combined as “Total VOCs”, did not trigger reporting.

In 2019, total VOCs were estimated using the total VOC emission factor from US EPA  AP-42 Section 2.4.  This method resulted in annual emissions exceeding the 10 tonnes reporting threshold.  This also meant that the speciated part 5 NPRI VOCs require reporting if they exceed 1 tonne released to air. Xylenes were the only speciated VOC that exceeded the 1 tonne threshold and therefore required reporting for 2019.
